kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.msg:

[INFO] Connecting to window: HP [PASS] Connect to Application: Connected to: HP

kw.arg: Failed to connect to HP application

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.name: Verify Carousel Apps

kw.name: Verify Carousel Apps
kw.msg: All required carousel apps are present

[PASS] Administrative Tools: 'Administrative Tools' present in carousel/Appbar [PASS] Calculator: 'Calculator' present in carousel/Appbar [PASS] Calendar: 'Calendar' present in carousel/Appbar [PASS] Command Prompt: 'Command Prompt' present in carousel/Appbar [PASS] Copilot: 'Copilot' present in carousel/Appbar
kw.doc: Verify carousel apps in HP application.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify all required carousel apps are present

test.name: Delete App From Carousel

kw.name: Del App
kw.msg: [PASS] Connect to Application: Connected to: HP [DEBUG] Starting delete workflow... [PASS] Clicked App: App: Administrative Tools [PASS] Delete Profile: Delete profile clicked [PASS] Popup Continue: Continue clicked [PASS] Clicked App: App: Calculator [PASS] Delete Profile: Delete profile clicked [PASS] Popup Checkbox: Checkbox selected [PASS] Popup Continue: Continue clicked [PASS] Clicked App: App: Calendar [PASS] Delete Profile: Delete profile clicked [PASS] Popup Verification: No popup appeared as expected. [DEBUG] Deleting remaining apps in carousel... [PASS] Delete Profile: Delete profile clicked [FAIL] Popup Continue: Continue button not found [PASS] Cleanup Delete: Deleted remaining app: Command Prompt [PASS] Delete Profile: Delete profile clicked [FAIL] Popup Continue: Continue button not found [PASS] Cleanup Delete: Deleted remaining app: Copilot [DEBUG] Delete workflow completed.
kw.doc: Robot Framework keyword to delete any app from carousel/Appbar.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.doc: Delete an app from carousel using tooltip module
